Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(****************************************************************************

 Pullbacks and equivalences

 Content:
 1. Any two pullbacks are equivalent
 2. Objects equivalent to pullbacks are pullbacks themselves

 ****************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.TransportLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.ClosedUnderInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Any two pullbacks are equivalent
 *)
Section UmpMorEquiv.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
          {f : b₁ --> b₃}
          {g : b₂ --> b₃}
          (cone₁ cone₂ : pb_cone f g)
          (H₁ : has_pb_ump cone₁)
          (H₂ : has_pb_ump cone₂).

  Definition pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr1
    : id₁ cone₂ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂
      ==>
      pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂
    := lunitor _
       • (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂)^-1
       • (_ ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁)^-1)
       • lassociator _ _ _.

  Definition pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2
    : id₁ cone₂ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂
      ==>
      pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂
    := lunitor _
       • (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂)^-1
       • (_ ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁)^-1)
       • lassociator _ _ _.

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
        • (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1)
       • (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
          ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1))
      • lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂))
     ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
       • (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1)
      • (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
         ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1))
     • lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
         (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂))
    ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
        • (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1)
       • (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
          ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1))
      • lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂))
     ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
      • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
     • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
         ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
    • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
         (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
       • ((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f))
      • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
          ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f))
     • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
        ▹ f)))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
   • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
      • (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
         • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
              ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
            • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
                  (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
               • rassociator
                   (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                    · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                   (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))) =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
           ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
         • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
               (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • (rassociator
                 (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                 (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
               • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
   • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
      • (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
         • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
              ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
            • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
                  (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
               • rassociator
                   (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                    · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                   (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))) = ?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
?b =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
           ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
         • ((lassociator 
               (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
               (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • (rassociator
                 (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                 (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
               • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
   • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
      • (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
         • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
              ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
            • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
                  (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
               • rassociator
                   (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                    · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                   (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
      • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
           ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
         • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
               (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                 · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
    • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
   • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
  • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
      ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
 • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
   • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
  • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
      ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
 • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
      • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
     • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
         ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
    • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
         (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
   • rassociator
       (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
           ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
         • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
               (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • (rassociator
                 (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                 (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
               • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
      • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
     • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
         ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
    • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
         (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
   • rassociator
       (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
?b =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
           ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
         • ((lassociator 
               (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
               (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • (rassociator
                 (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                 (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
               • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• ((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
      • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
     • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
         ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
    • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
         (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
   • rassociator
       (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?b

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
    • lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g))
   • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
  • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
      ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
 • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g = ?b

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
    • pb_cone_cell cone₂)
   • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g))
  • ((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
      ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g))
 • (lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g = ?b

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• (pb_cone_cell cone₂
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
      • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
           ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
         • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
               (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • rassociator
                (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                 · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)))) = ?b

      apply idpath.

               (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)

            • rassociator
                (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                 · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)))) =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • (((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)

            • (rassociator

                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                 (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
               • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
                  · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

            • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
               ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
            (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
          ▹ g)
         • (((rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
                (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
             • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
                 (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
            • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
               ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                   (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))) = ?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
?b =
((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
• (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
     ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
         (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) 
         (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
           (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
           (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
         • (rassociator 
              (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
              (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
              (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
            • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
               ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
            (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
          ▹ g)
         • (((rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
                (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
             • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))

            • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
               ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                   (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
   (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
• (((rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
       (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
    • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
        (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
   • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
      ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
          (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
  • (rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
       (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
 • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
   • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
       (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)) ▹ g)
 • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((id₂
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
     · (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)) ▹ g)
 • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(id₂
   (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
    · (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) · g)
 • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
  (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
       (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g

H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)

         • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
            ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)))) =
((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
• (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
     ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)

              (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
            • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
               ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
                  ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))))

pb_cone_cell cone₂

     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
      · (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)) ▹ f)
  • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
 • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
    ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f))
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((id₂
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
     · (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) · f)
  • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
 • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
    ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f))
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
   (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
    ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f))
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
  (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
    ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
   • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
      ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
• (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
     ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
        (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
      • ((pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
          ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
              (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
         • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
            ◃ (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
               ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) =
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
           (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
         • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
            ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
• (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
     ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
        (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
      • ((pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
          ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
              (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
         • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
            ◃ ((((lassociator (pr1 H₂ cone₁)
                    (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
                  • (pb_1cell_pr1 (pr1 H₂ cone₁) ▹ f))
                 • pb_cone_cell cone₁)
                • ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₂ cone₁)) ^-1
                   ▹ g))
               • rassociator (pr1 H₂ cone₁)
                   (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))) =
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
           (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
         • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
            ◃ rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
                (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))))

                  ▹ g)))))) =

• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))

            • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
               ◃ ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₂ cone₁)) ^-1
                  ▹ g)))))) = ?b

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ f)
• (((((pb_1cell_pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) ▹ f)
      • pb_cone_cell cone₂)
     • ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)) ^-1 ▹ g))
    • rassociator (pr1 H₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
   • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
      ◃ ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₂ cone₁)) ^-1 ▹ g))) = 
?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
?b =
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (rassociator (pr1 H₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (rassociator (pr1 H₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
         ◃ ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₂ cone₁)) ^-1 ▹ g)))) =
pb_cone_cell cone₂
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
        ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1) ▹ g)
      • rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g))

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
rassociator (pr1 H₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
   ◃ ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₂ cone₁)) ^-1 ▹ g)) =
((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂ ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1)
 ▹ g)
• rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
    (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
((pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂)
  ◃ (pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 H₂ cone₁)) ^-1) ▹ g)
• rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
    (pr1 H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂ ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1)
 ▹ g)
• rassociator (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))
    (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
id₁ cone₂ ==> pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • (?Goal0 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • (?Goal ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
id₁ cone₂ · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
· pb_cone_pr1 cone₂
 exact pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr1.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
id₁ cone₂ · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ ==>
pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
· pb_cone_pr2 cone₂
 exact pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
 • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2 ▹ g))
• rassociator
    (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g =
((lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁)
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
   ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 exact pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_cell.
  Defined.

H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
is_invertible_2cell
  pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
     • (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₁ cone₂) ^-1)
    • (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
       ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ cone₁) ^-1))
   • lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
       (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂))

      is_iso.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
is_invertible_2cell
  pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_pr2
 
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (((lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
     • (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₁ cone₂) ^-1)
    • (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂
       ◃ (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ cone₁) ^-1))
   • lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)
       (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂))

      is_iso.
  Defined.
End UmpMorEquiv.


B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
left_adjoint_equivalence (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
left_adjoint_equivalence (pb_ump_mor H₁ cone₂)

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
left_equivalence (pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂))

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g

H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
id₁ cone₂ ==> pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · ?pr1
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(λ _ : id₁ cone₂ ==> pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) ==> id₁ cone₁) 
  ?pr10
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) 
  ?pr11

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
 exact (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁).
  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
id₁ cone₂ ==> pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁
 exact (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit cone₁ cone₂ H₁ H₂).
  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(λ _ : id₁ cone₂ ==>
       pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) · pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁,
 pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁ · pr1 (pr1 H₁ cone₂) ==>
 id₁ cone₁)
  (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit cone₁
     cone₂ H₁ H₂)
 exact ((pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_inv2cell cone₂ cone₁ H₂  H₁)^-1).
  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁,,
      pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit cone₁
        cone₂ H₁ H₂,,
      (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         cone₂ cone₁ H₂ H₁) ^-1))
 apply pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_inv2cell.
  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₁: has_pb_ump cone₁
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁,,
             pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit
               cone₁ cone₂ H₁ H₂,,
             (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                cone₂ cone₁ H₂ H₁) ^-1)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (pb_ump_mor H₂ cone₁,,
       pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit cone₁
         cone₂ H₁ H₂,,
       (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
          cone₂ cone₁ H₂ H₁) ^-1)))
  (pb_ump_mor_left_adjoint_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
     cone₁ cone₂ H₁ H₂)
 apply is_invertible_2cell_inv.
Defined.

(**
 2. Objects equivalent to pullbacks are pullbacks themselves
 *)
Section IdEquivalenceToPB.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
          {f : b₁ --> b₃}
          {g : b₂ --> b₃}
          {q : B}
          {qpr1 qpr1' : q --> b₁}
          {qpr2 qpr2' : q --> b₂}
          (qγ : invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g))
          (qγ' : invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g))
          (H₂ : has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ'))
          (lpr1 : invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1')
          (lpr2 : invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2')
          (lc : qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ').

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
pb_ump_1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
pb_ump_1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
pb_1cell qc (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
B ⟦ qc, make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ ⟧
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
invertible_2cell
  (?φ · pb_cone_pr1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ))
  (pb_cone_pr1 qc)
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
invertible_2cell
  (?φ · pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ))
  (pb_cone_pr2 qc)
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
?φ ◃ pb_cone_cell (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ) =
(((lassociator ?φ
     (pb_cone_pr1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)) f
   • (?τ ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell qc) • 
 (?θ ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator ?φ
    (pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)) g

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
B ⟦ qc, make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ ⟧
 exact (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
invertible_2cell
  (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc
   · pb_cone_pr1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ))
  (pb_cone_pr1 qc)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ lpr1)
               (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ qc)).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
invertible_2cell
  (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc
   · pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ))
  (pb_cone_pr2 qc)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ lpr2)
               (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ qc)).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: pb_cone f g
pb_ump_mor H₂ qc
◃ pb_cone_cell (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ) =
(((lassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc)
     (pb_cone_pr1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)) f
   • (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc) lpr1)
        (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H₂ qc) ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell qc)
 • ((comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
          (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc) lpr2)
       (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H₂ qc)) ^-1 ▹ g))
• rassociator (pb_ump_mor H₂ qc)
    (pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)) g
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         use (vcomp_rcancel (_ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g))) ;
         [ is_iso ; apply property_from_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite lc ;
         rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
         refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (pb_ump_mor_cell H₂ qc) @ _) ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         do 3 apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite vcomp_linv ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  Section UMP2.
    Context {qc : B}
            {φ ψ : qc --> q}
            (α : φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1)
            (β : φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2)
            (p : (φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator _ _ _ • (β ▹ g) • rassociator _ _ _
                 =
                 lassociator _ _ _ • (α ▹ f) • rassociator _ _ _ • (ψ ◃ qγ)).

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((φ ◃ qγ') • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
 • ((((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)) ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2' g =
((lassociator φ qpr1' f
  • ((((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((φ ◃ qγ') • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
 • ((((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)) ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2' g =
((lassociator φ qpr1' f
  • ((((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((φ ◃ qγ') • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
 • ((((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g) • (β ▹ g))
    • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g))) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g =
((lassociator φ qpr1' f
  • ((((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f) • (α ▹ f))
     • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))) • rassociator ψ qpr1' f)
• (ψ ◃ qγ')

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ qγ')
• (lassociator φ qpr2' g
   • (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((β ▹ g)
         • (((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g)))) =
lassociator φ qpr1' f
• (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((α ▹ f)
      • (((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f)
         • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ')))))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
lassociator φ qpr1' f
• (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((α ▹ f)
      • (((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f)
         • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))))) =
(φ ◃ qγ')
• (lassociator φ qpr2' g
   • (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((β ▹ g)
         • (((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g))))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
lassociator φ qpr1' f
• (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((α ▹ f)
      • (((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f)
         • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))))) = 
?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
?b =
(φ ◃ qγ')
• (lassociator φ qpr2' g
   • (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((β ▹ g)
         • (((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g))))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'

α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
lassociator φ qpr1' f
• (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((α ▹ f)
      • (((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f)
         • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))))) = 
?b

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((((lassociator φ qpr1' f • ((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f))
   • (α ▹ f)) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ') = ?b

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B

H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((((((φ ◃ (lpr1 ▹ f)) • (φ ◃ qγ'))
    • lassociator φ qpr2' g) • ((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g))

(((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f)) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((((φ ◃ ((lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ')) • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
   • ((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)) • (β ▹ g))
 • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g)) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g =
(((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f)) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'

β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((((φ ◃ (qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g))) • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
   • ((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)) • (β ▹ g))
 • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g)) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g =
(((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f)) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g))
• (lassociator φ qpr2' g
   • (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((β ▹ g)
         • (((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g)))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((((φ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g)) • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
   • ((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)) • (β ▹ g))
 • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) ▹ g)) • rassociator ψ qpr2' g = ?t2

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(β ▹ g) • (rassociator ψ qpr2 g • (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ qγ)
• (lassociator φ qpr2 g
   • ((β ▹ g)
      • (rassociator ψ qpr2 g • (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g))))) =
lassociator φ qpr1 f
• ((α ▹ f)
   • (((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
 • rassociator ψ qpr2 g) • (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g)) =
(((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f)) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
  • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • (ψ ◃ qγ))
• (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g)) =
(((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f)) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
lassociator φ qpr1 f
• ((α ▹ f)
   • (rassociator ψ qpr1 f
      • ((ψ ◃ qγ) • (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g))))) =
lassociator φ qpr1 f
• ((α ▹ f)
   • (((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
rassociator ψ qpr1 f • ((ψ ◃ qγ) • (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ▹ g))) =
((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f) • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧

qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'

qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
rassociator ψ qpr1 f • (ψ ◃ (qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g))) =
((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f) • (rassociator ψ qpr1' f • (ψ ◃ qγ'))

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) •

(rassociator ψ qpr1 f • (ψ ◃ (lpr1 ▹ f))) • (ψ ◃ qγ') =

lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
rassociator ψ qpr1 f • (ψ ◃ (lpr1 ▹ f)) =
((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f) • rassociator ψ qpr1' f

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f) • rassociator ψ qpr1' f =
((ψ ◃ lpr1) ▹ f) • rassociator ψ qpr1' f

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

  • lassociator φ
      (pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')) g)
 • (?β ▹ g))

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ'))
  • lassociator φ
      (pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')) g)
 • ((((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)) ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ
    (pb_cone_pr2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')) g =
((lassociator φ
    (pb_cone_pr1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')) f
  • ((((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ
     (pb_cone_pr1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ'))
 exact id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell ▹ qpr1 =
α

qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
  (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
  id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
▹ qpr1 = α

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
is_invertible_2cell (φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1)

((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1)
• (pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
     (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
     (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
     id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
   ▹ qpr1) = (φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α

        is_iso.

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) •

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
    (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
    (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
    id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
  ▹ qpr1') • (ψ ◃ lpr1 ^-1)) • (ψ ◃ lpr1) =
((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
    (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
    (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
    id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
  ▹ qpr1') • (ψ ◃ lpr1 ^-1)) • (ψ ◃ lpr1) = ?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧

q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'

qc: B

α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
?b = ((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

((pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
    (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
    (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
  (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
  id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
▹ qpr1' = ?y'

        apply (pb_ump_cell_pr1 H₂).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)) • (ψ ◃ lpr1 ^-1))
• (ψ ◃ lpr1) = ((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1)
• (α • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) • ((ψ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)))) =
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • (ψ ◃ lpr1))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1)
• (α • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) • (ψ ◃ (lpr1 ^-1 • lpr1)))) =
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • (ψ ◃ lpr1))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) • (ψ ◃ id₂ qpr1'))) =
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • (ψ ◃ lpr1))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • ((ψ ◃ lpr1) • id₂ (ψ · qpr1'))) =
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • (ψ ◃ lpr1))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • (ψ ◃ lpr1)) =
(φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • (α • (ψ ◃ lpr1))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell ▹ qpr2 =
β

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
  (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
  id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
▹ qpr2 = β

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')

β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
is_invertible_2cell (φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)

• (pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ

     (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

   ▹ qpr2) = (φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β

        is_iso.

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
is_invertible_2cell lpr2

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)
 • (pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
      (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
      (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
      id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
    ▹ qpr2)) • (ψ ◃ lpr2) =
((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
    (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
    (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
    id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
  ▹ qpr2') • (ψ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)) • (ψ ◃ lpr2) =
((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
    (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
    (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
    id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
  ▹ qpr2') • (ψ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)) • (ψ ◃ lpr2) = ?b
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
?b = ((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ
    (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
    (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
    id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
  ▹ qpr2') • (ψ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)) • (ψ ◃ lpr2) = ?b

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
pb_ump_cell H₂ φ ψ (((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1))
  (((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2))
  id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq
▹ qpr2' = ?y'

        apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 H₂).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
((((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)) • (ψ ◃ lpr2 ^-1))
• (ψ ◃ lpr2) = ((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)
• (β • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) • ((ψ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)))) =
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1)
• (β • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) • (ψ ◃ (lpr2 ^-1 • lpr2)))) =
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) • (ψ ◃ id₂ qpr2'))) =
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • ((ψ ◃ lpr2) • id₂ (ψ · qpr2'))) =
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2)) =
(φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
isaprop (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β)

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
