lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
isaprop (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β)

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
ζ₁ = ζ₂

      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
isPredicate
  (λ x : φ ==> ψ, x ▹ qpr1 = α × x ▹ qpr2 = β)
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

qc: B

α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) •

ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
x: φ ==> ψ
isaprop (x ▹ qpr1 = α × x ▹ qpr2 = β)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property.
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B

qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
φ · qpr1' ==> ψ · qpr1'

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'

qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
φ · qpr1' ==> ψ · qpr1'
 exact ((_ ◃ lpr1^-1) • α • (_ ◃ lpr1)).

β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2

• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) •

ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β

 exact ((_ ◃ lpr2^-1) • β • (_ ◃ lpr2)).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
(((φ ◃ qγ') • lassociator φ qpr2' g)
 • ((((φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • β) • (ψ ◃ lpr2)) ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2' g =
((lassociator φ qpr1' f
  • ((((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)) ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1' f) • (ψ ◃ qγ')
 exact id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2_cell_eq.

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1

p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr1' = ((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)

 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker φ
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv lpr1)) ^-1
• (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr1') = α • (ψ ◃ lpr1)

        exact (pr12 ζ₁).

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr2' = (φ ◃ lpr2 ^-1) • (β • (ψ ◃ lpr2))

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker φ
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv lpr2)) ^-1
• (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr2') = β • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
(φ ◃ lpr2) • (pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr2') = β • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')

lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
(pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr2) • (ψ ◃ lpr2) = β • (ψ ◃ lpr2)

        
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₁ ▹ qpr2 = β

        exact (pr22 ζ₁).
      
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ qpr1' = ((φ ◃ lpr1 ^-1) • α) • (ψ ◃ lpr1)

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ qpr1 = α

        exact (pr12 ζ₂).

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧

H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
qc: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ qc, q ⟧
α: φ · qpr1 ==> ψ · qpr1
β: φ · qpr2 ==> ψ · qpr2
p: (((φ ◃ qγ) • lassociator φ qpr2 g) • (β ▹ g))
• rassociator ψ qpr2 g =
((lassociator φ qpr1 f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ qpr1 f) • 
(ψ ◃ qγ)
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, γ ▹ qpr1 = α × γ ▹ qpr2 = β
pr1 ζ₂ ▹ qpr2 = β

        exact (pr22 ζ₂).
    Qed.
  End UMP2.

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
pb_ump_2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)

qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
pb_ump_1 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)
 exact id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_1.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qpr1, qpr1': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qpr2, qpr2': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
qγ: invertible_2cell (qpr1 · f) (qpr2 · g)
qγ': invertible_2cell (qpr1' · f) (qpr2' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone q qpr1' qpr2' qγ')
lpr1: invertible_2cell qpr1 qpr1'
lpr2: invertible_2cell qpr2 qpr2'
lc: qγ • (lpr2 ▹ g) = (lpr1 ▹ f) • qγ'
pb_ump_2 (make_pb_cone q qpr1 qpr2 qγ)
 exact id_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_ump_2.
  Defined.
End IdEquivalenceToPB.


B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
p: pr1 cone₁ = pr1 cone₂
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p)
   · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) 
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
qp2: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p)
   · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) 
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) 
          (pr1 cone₁) (! p))
       (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p)
     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p))
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • 
(qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
has_pb_ump cone₁


B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
p: pr1 cone₁ = pr1 cone₂
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p)
   · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) 
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
qp2: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p)
   · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) 
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) 
          (pr1 cone₁) (! p))
       (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p)
     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! p))
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • 
(qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
has_pb_ump cone₁

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
cone: ∑ (π₁ : B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧) (π₂ : B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧),
invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
p: pr1 (q,, cone) = pr1 cone₂
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) 
     (pr1 (q,, cone)) (! p)
   · pb_cone_pr1 (q,, cone)) 
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
qp2: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) 
     (pr1 (q,, cone)) (! p)
   · pb_cone_pr2 (q,, cone)) 
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
          (pr1 (q,, cone)) 
          (! p)) (pb_cone_pr1 (q,, cone)) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) 
       (pr1 (q,, cone)) (! p)
     ◃ pb_cone_cell (q,, cone)))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) 
        (pr1 (q,, cone)) 
        (! p)) (pb_cone_pr2 (q,, cone)) g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
has_pb_ump (q,, cone)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
cone: ∑ π₂ : B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
p: pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone) = pr1 cone₂
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone)) 
     (! p) · pb_cone_pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone))
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
qp2: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone)) 
     (! p) · pb_cone_pr2 (q,, qp₁,, cone))
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
          (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone)) 
          (! p)) (pb_cone_pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone))
       f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
       (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone)) 
       (! p) ◃ pb_cone_cell (q,, qp₁,, cone)))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
        (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, cone)) 
        (! p)) (pb_cone_pr2 (q,, qp₁,, cone)) g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁,, cone)

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

cone₂: pb_cone f g

p: pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ) = pr1 cone₂

  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ))

  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂)

        (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
        (! p))

• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂: B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (qp₂ · g)
q': B
cone: ∑ (π₁ : B ⟦ q', b₁ ⟧) (π₂ : B ⟦ q', b₂ ⟧),
invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q',, cone)
p: pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ) = pr1 (q',, cone)
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, cone))
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
     (! p) · pb_cone_pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ))
  (pb_cone_pr1 (q',, cone))
qp2: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, cone))
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
     (! p) · pb_cone_pr2 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ))
  (pb_cone_pr2 (q',, cone))
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, cone))
          (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
          (! p))
       (pb_cone_pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, cone))
       (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
       (! p) ◃ pb_cone_cell (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, cone))
        (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
        (! p))
     (pb_cone_pr2 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell (q',, cone))
has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)

 • lassociator

        (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
        (! p))
     (pb_cone_pr2 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) g)

pr1 (pb_cone_cell (q',, qp₁',, cone))
has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

qp₁': B ⟦ q', b₁ ⟧
qp₂': B ⟦ q', b₂ ⟧
γ': invertible_2cell (qp₁' · f) (qp₂' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
p: pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ) =
pr1 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
     (! p) · pb_cone_pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ))

  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))
     (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
     (! p) · pb_cone_pr2 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ))
  (pb_cone_pr2 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))

   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0
          (pr1 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))
          (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
          (! p))

  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))

 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))
        (pr1 (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)) 
        (! p))

pr1 (pb_cone_cell (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ'))

B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂: B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (qp₂ · g)
q': B
qp₁': B ⟦ q', b₁ ⟧
qp₂': B ⟦ q', b₂ ⟧
γ': invertible_2cell (qp₁' · f) (qp₂' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q',, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
p: q = q'
qp1: invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 q' q (! p)) · qp₁) qp₁'
qp2: invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 q' q (! p)) · qp₂) qp₂'
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 q' q (! p)))
       qp₁ f)
  • (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 q' q (! p)) ◃ γ))
 • lassociator (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 q' q (! p)))
     qp₂ g) • (qp2 ▹ g) = 
pr1 γ'
has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧

qp₂': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧

qp2: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₂) qp₂'

  • (id₁ q ◃ γ)) • lassociator (id₁ q) qp₂ g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 γ'
has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁,, qp₂,, γ)

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂: B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (qp₂ · g)
qp₁': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ': invertible_2cell (qp₁' · f) (qp₂' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
qp1: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₁) qp₁'
qp2: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₂) qp₂'
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f) • rassociator (id₁ q) qp₁ f)
  • (id₁ q ◃ γ)) • lassociator (id₁ q) qp₂ g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 γ'
γ • (?lpr2 ▹ g) = (?lpr1 ▹ f) • γ'

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂: B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (qp₂ · g)
qp₁': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ': invertible_2cell (qp₁' · f) (qp₂' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
qp1: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₁) qp₁'
qp2: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₂) qp₂'
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f) • rassociator (id₁ q) qp₁ f)
  • (id₁ q ◃ γ)) • lassociator (id₁ q) qp₂ g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 γ'
invertible_2cell qp₁ qp₁'
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _) qp1).
  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂: B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (qp₂ · g)
qp₁': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ': invertible_2cell (qp₁' · f) (qp₂' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
qp1: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₁) qp₁'
qp2: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₂) qp₂'
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f) • rassociator (id₁ q) qp₁ f)
  • (id₁ q ◃ γ)) • lassociator (id₁ q) qp₂ g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 γ'
invertible_2cell qp₂ qp₂'
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _) qp2).
  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
q: B
qp₁: B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂: B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (qp₁ · f) (qp₂ · g)
qp₁': B ⟦ q, b₁ ⟧
qp₂': B ⟦ q, b₂ ⟧
γ': invertible_2cell (qp₁' · f) (qp₂' · g)
H₂: has_pb_ump (q,, qp₁',, qp₂',, γ')
qp1: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₁) qp₁'
qp2: invertible_2cell (id₁ q · qp₂) qp₂'
path: ((((qp1 ^-1 ▹ f) • rassociator (id₁ q) qp₁ f)
  • (id₁ q ◃ γ)) • lassociator (id₁ q) qp₂ g)
• (qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 γ'
γ
• (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell qp₂) qp2 ▹ g) =
(comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell qp₁) qp1 ▹ f) • γ'
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso ; apply property_from_invertible_2cell | ] ; cbn ;
       refine (_ @ path) ;
       rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
       rewrite !vassocl ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       rewrite !vassocr ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
       rewrite !vassocl ;
       rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
       rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
       rewrite !vassocr ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
       rewrite !vassocr ;
       rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
       rewrite id2_left ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.

Section EquivalenceToPBHelp.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB_2_0 : is_univalent_2_0 B)
          {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
          {f : b₁ --> b₃}
          {g : b₂ --> b₃}
          (cone₁ cone₂ : pb_cone f g)
          (H₂ : has_pb_ump cone₂)
          (l : cone₁ --> cone₂)
          (Hl : left_adjoint_equivalence l)
          (r := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl)
          (rpr1 : invertible_2cell
                    (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
                    (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂))
          (rpr2 : invertible_2cell
                    (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
                    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂))
          (path : (r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁) • lassociator _ _ _ • (rpr2 ▹ g)
                  =
                  lassociator _ _ _ • (rpr1 ▹ f) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)).

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
     (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))) r

rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =

B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =

 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (idtoiso_2_0 cone₁ cone₂
     (isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))) = r

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
left_adjoint_right_adjoint (l,, Hl) = r

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr1
    : invertible_2cell
        (idtoiso_2_0 _ _ (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))
         ·
         pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
            _
            help_inv2cell)
         rpr1.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr2
    : invertible_2cell
        (idtoiso_2_0 _ _ (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))
         ·
         pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
            _
            help_inv2cell)
         rpr2.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((((left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
          (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
       (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
       (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))
     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr2 ▹ g) =
pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧

H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((((left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁

     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))

     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr2 ▹ g) =

B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((((((pr2 rpr1) ^-1
     • ((pr2 help_inv2cell) ^-1 ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁))
    ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (pr1
          (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
             (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
       (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (pr1
       (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
          (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
           (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) • rpr2) ▹ g) =
pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
(((pr2 rpr1) ^-1
  • ((pr2 help_inv2cell) ^-1 ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)) ▹ f)
• (rassociator
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
           (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
   • ((pr1
         (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
            (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
       ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
      • (lassociator
           (pr1
              (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
                 (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
           (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
         • (((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
             • rpr2) ▹ g)))) =
pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
rassociator
  (pr1
     (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• ((pr1
      (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
         (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
    ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
   • (lassociator
        (pr1
           (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
              (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) • rpr2)
         ▹ g))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr2 rpr1))
      (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
         (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr2 help_inv2cell)))))
^-1 • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
rassociator
  (pr1
     (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• ((pr1
      (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
         (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
    ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
   • (lassociator
        (pr1
           (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
              (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) • rpr2)
         ▹ g))) =
(((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) • rpr1) ▹ f)
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
rassociator
  (pr1
     (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• ((pr1
      (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
         (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
    ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
   • (lassociator
        (pr1
           (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
              (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) ▹ g)
         • (rpr2 ▹ g)))) =
(((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
rassociator
  (pr1
     (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• ((pr1
      (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
         (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
    ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
   • (lassociator
        (pr1
           (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
              (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) ▹ g)
         • (rpr2 ▹ g)))) =
((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
• ((rpr1 ▹ f) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g

B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

?b =
((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
• ((rpr1 ▹ f) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

?t2

      apply idpath.

(help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁ · f)
• ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
   • (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g • (rpr2 ▹ g))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
rassociator
  (pr1
     (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• ((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁ · f)
   • ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
      • (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
         • (rpr2 ▹ g)))) =
((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
• ((rpr1 ▹ f) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
(((rassociator
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_2_0 cone₂ cone₁
           (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))))
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
   • (help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁ · f))
  • (r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
(((((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
   • rassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B

g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((help_inv2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) ▹ f)
• (rassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
   • ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
      • (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g

• ((rpr1 ▹ f) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)

(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
rassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)

B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
(r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
• (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g • (rpr2 ▹ g)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
   f) ^-1 • ((rpr1 ▹ f) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • (rpr2 ▹ g) =
((is_invertible_2cell_rassociator r
    (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f) ^-1 • (rpr1 ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    exact path.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
has_pb_ump cone₁

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

has_pb_ump cone₁

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
pr1 cone₁ = pr1 cone₂
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! ?p)
   · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) 
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! ?p)
   · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) 
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((((?qp1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! ?p))
       (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! ?p)
     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁) (! ?p))
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • 
(?qp2 ▹ g) = pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
pr1 cone₁ = pr1 cone₂
 exact (isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l ,, Hl)).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁)
     (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))
   · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
 exact left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr1.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁)
     (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))
   · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
 exact left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr2.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
rpr1: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
rpr2: invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
path: ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
((((left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr1 ^-1 ▹ f)
   • rassociator
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁)
          (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
       (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f)
  • (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁)
       (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl))
     ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
 • lassociator
     (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 cone₂) (pr1 cone₁)
        (! isotoid_2_0 HB_2_0 (l,, Hl)))
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_pr2 ▹ g) =
pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 exact left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_help_path.
  Defined.
End EquivalenceToPBHelp.

Section LeftAdjointEquivalenceToPB.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB_2_0 : is_univalent_2_0 B)
          {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
          {f : b₁ --> b₃}
          {g : b₂ --> b₃}
          (cone₁ cone₂ : pb_cone f g)
          (H₂ : has_pb_ump cone₂)
          (l : cone₁ --> cone₂)
          (Hl : left_adjoint_equivalence l)
          (lpr1 : invertible_2cell
                    (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
                    (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁))
          (lpr2 : invertible_2cell
                    (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
                    (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁))
          (path : (_ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂) • lassociator _ _ _ • (lpr2 ▹ g)
                  =
                  lassociator _ _ _ • (lpr1 ▹ f) • pb_cone_cell cone₁).

  Let r : cone₂ --> cone₁
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl.
  Let η : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (l · r)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl.
  Let ε : invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr1
    : invertible_2cell
        (r · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
            _
            (inv_of_invertible_2cell lpr1))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ ε)
               (lunitor_invertible_2cell _))).

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr2
    : invertible_2cell
        (r · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
        (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
            _
            (inv_of_invertible_2cell lpr2))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ ε)
               (lunitor_invertible_2cell _))).

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr1 ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr1 ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1)
    • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
       • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
          • lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)))) ▹ g) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1)
     • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
        • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
            ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
           • lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)))) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
         • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))) =
(lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
    • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
       • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
            ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
          • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)))))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
• (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
   • (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
         • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
              ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))))) =
lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• (((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)))))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• (((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) =
(r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
• (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
   • (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
         • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
              ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• (((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) = ?b
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
?b =
(r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
• (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
   • (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
         • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
              ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
• (((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f)
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((((lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
    • ((r ◃ lpr1 ^-1) ▹ f))
   • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
  • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
     ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂) = ?b

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(((((r ◃ (lpr1 ^-1 ▹ f))
    • lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
   • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
  • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
     ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂) = ?b

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(r ◃ (lpr1 ^-1 ▹ f))
• (lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(r ◃ (lpr1 ^-1 ▹ f))
• (lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) =
(r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
• (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
   • (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
      • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
         • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
              ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
        ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)))) =
(r ◃ (lpr1 ▹ f))
• ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
   • (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
      • (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
         • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
            • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
                 ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
               • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))))))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(r ◃ lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• (lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
            • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))) =
(r ◃ lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
• ((r ◃ (lpr1 ▹ f))
   • ((r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
      • (lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
         • (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
            • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
                ▹ g)
               • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
                    ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
                  • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))))))

    
B: bicat

lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)

 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(((((r ◃ lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
    • lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
   • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
  • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
     ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂) =
(((((((r ◃ lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f)
      • (r ◃ (lpr1 ▹ f))) • (r ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁))
    • lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
   • ((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g))
  • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
 • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    ▹ g)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)

 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• (lassociator (r · l) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
        ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)

         • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)))) =

                  • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))))))) =
?b

η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
• (((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g)
   • ((lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
      • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
           ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)
         • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(((lassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g
   • ((r ◃ lpr2 ^-1) ▹ g))
  • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
 • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    ▹ g)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g) = ?t2

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)

• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁

η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((((r ◃ (lpr2 ^-1 ▹ g))
   • lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
  • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
 • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    ▹ g)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g) = ?t2

      apply idpath.

 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((((r ◃ (id₂ (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
   • lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
  • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
 • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    ▹ g)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((((r ◃ id₂ (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g))
   • lassociator r (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
  • (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))
 • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
    ▹ g)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g) = ?t20

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)

 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(r ◃ (l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))
• (lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
   • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
       ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
      • (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
         • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))) =
lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• (lassociator (r · l) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
        ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))

r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• ((r · l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
   • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
       ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
      • (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
         • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)))) =
lassociator r l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• (lassociator (r · l) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
        ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
         • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(r · l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
    ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g)
   • (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
      • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))) =
lassociator (r · l) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• (((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
    ▹ f)
   • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(((r · l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
  • (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
     ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g))
 • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g) =
((lassociator (r · l) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
     ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)

 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)
   ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
  • (id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂))
 • lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g) =
((lassociator (r · l) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
  • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
     ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl)

B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)

 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁

η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• ((id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
   • (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
      • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g))) =
(left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hl) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
   • ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
      • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)

 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
