η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g
   • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) ▹ g)) =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
(id₁ cone₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
• lunitor (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂ · g) =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f) • pb_cone_cell cone₂ =
lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
• ((lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f)
   • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f) • pb_cone_cell cone₂ =
(lassociator (id₁ cone₂) (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f) • pb_cone_cell cone₂ =
lunitor (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂ · f)
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)

 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
has_pb_ump cone₁

HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B

B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl)
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g) • 
(?rpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl)
   (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f • 
 (?rpr1 ▹ f)) • pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl · pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
 exact left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr1.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl · pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
 exact left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr2.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₃ ⟧
g: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
cone₁, cone₂: pb_cone f g
H₂: has_pb_ump cone₂
l: B ⟦ cone₁, cone₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
lpr1: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁)
lpr2: invertible_2cell (l · pb_cone_pr2 cone₂)
  (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁)
path: ((l ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 • lassociator l (pb_cone_pr2 cone₂) g)
• (lpr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator l (pb_cone_pr1 cone₂) f
 • (lpr1 ▹ f)) • pb_cone_cell cone₁
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ cone₂, cone₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ cone₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ cone₂)
((left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl ◃ pb_cone_cell cone₁)
 • lassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl)
     (pb_cone_pr2 cone₁) g)
• (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr2 ▹ g) =
(lassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl)
   (pb_cone_pr1 cone₁) f
 • (left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_pr1 ▹ f))
• pr1 (pb_cone_cell cone₂)
 exact left_adjoint_equivalence_to_pb_eq.
  Defined.
End LeftAdjointEquivalenceToPB.
